_schema: spec #28 Phase 0.3 — 50 question/episode pairs for the O3 semantic-recall gate

_field_docs.question: natural-language query passed to search_corpus(mode=hybrid)
_field_docs.relevant_episode_ids: ground-truth set — episodes that should appear in top-5; multiple correct episodes per question are common and supported
_field_docs.category: what failure mode this query stresses (lexical-easy / semantic-only / cross-podcast / specificity / language / etc.)
_field_docs.notes: ungraded scratchpad for the human author

_targets.phase_2_gate: Run against `search_corpus(mode=hybrid)` over a real corpus subset. Pass = top-5 recall ≥ 0.8 (≥ 40/50 questions have at least one of their relevant_episode_ids in the top 5).

_corpus_sample_note: Episode IDs are taken from the 241 cleaned-with-JSON-sidecar episodes available at the time of authoring (audit_segment_coverage.py output 2026-04-28).

pairs.question: AI infrastructure capex and hyperscaler spending
